summary: Iteration 78: Connect Services Hub feature testing complete. All features working correctly - 7 integrations displayed, 6 Zoho DCs available, dialogs functioning. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Connect Services Hub fully implemented and working. All 7 integrations (Stripe, GoCardless, GoCardless Sandbox, Zoho Mail, Resend, Zoho CRM, Zoho Books) are displayed in the Connect Services tab under INTEGRATIONS sidebar section. CRM and Finance tabs have been removed from sidebar as expected.

verified_features.sidebar_integrations_section: PASS - INTEGRATIONS section visible with Connect Services tab
verified_features.crm_tab_removed: PASS - CRM tab NOT present in sidebar
verified_features.finance_tab_removed: PASS - Finance tab NOT present in sidebar
verified_features.connect_services_page: PASS - Shows all 7 integrations organized by category
verified_features.7_integrations_displayed: PASS - Stripe, GoCardless, GoCardless Sandbox, Zoho Mail, Resend, Zoho CRM, Zoho Books all visible
verified_features.zoho_dc_dialog: PASS - Opens with DC selection dropdown showing all 6 DCs (US, EU, IN, AU, JP, CA)
verified_features.resend_api_key_dialog: PASS - Opens with API key input field and Cancel/Save buttons
verified_features.cancel_button_zoho_dialog: PASS - Closes the DC selection dialog
verified_features.cancel_button_api_key_dialog: PASS - Closes the API key dialog
verified_features.api_get_integrations: PASS - Returns all 7 integrations with correct fields
verified_features.api_zoho_data_centers: PASS - Returns all 6 Zoho data centers

mocked_apis.note: OAuth flows redirect to actual Zoho/Stripe/GoCardless - full OAuth completion requires real credentials in provider console. Endpoints are implemented correctly.
